scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json stacktape.ts run-overnight.ts vitest.config.ts apps packages scripts evals .github/workflows
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json stacktape.ts run-overnight.ts vitest.config.ts apps packages scripts evals .github/workflows
scripts.lint: oxlint apps packages scripts stacktape.ts run-overnight.ts *.config.ts --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.validate: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run evals && pnpm run build
scripts.validate:fix: oxlint apps packages scripts stacktape.ts run-overnight.ts *.config.ts --fix --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && pnpm run format && pnpm run validate
